description_long: This object is a detailed model of a shrimp, displaying a segmented, elongated body with a translucent, pinkish exoskeleton marked by reddish spots. The cephalothorax is robust and tapers into a slender, flexible abdomen, ending in a fan-shaped tail. Prominent, thin antennae extend from the head, and multiple jointed legs are visible beneath the body, some of which are longer and more delicate. The eyes are small, dark, and positioned on short stalks at the front of the head. The surface appears slightly glossy and moist, typical of a fresh crustacean, with subtle textural ridges and fine details along the shell.
description: A lifelike shrimp with a segmented, pinkish body, long antennae, and multiple jointed legs, featuring a glossy, slightly translucent shell.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shrimp, highlighting the segmented body, long antennae, and the curvature of the tail.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the symmetry of the body, the arrangement of legs, and the fan-shaped tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, but with the head facing right and the tail to the left, showing the other side's leg arrangement.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the head, antennae, and eye placement, with the legs and mouthparts visible beneath the cephalothorax.
